title: HPCORA Long Dustpan and Brush Set, Windproof Vertical Extension Pole Handle Rotatable Broom Set Dustpan Set (Blue)
features: 1.1 Set Windproof Vertical Telescopic Pole Handle Broom Set Dustpan Set : Suitable for a variety of indoor and outdoor environments. The broom features a windproof design that prevents wind from blowing trash onto the broom to ensure effective sweeping. The vertical extension pole handle is adjustable in length to suit different heights and angles of sweeping. Dustpan set comes with a medium capacity dustpan for easy trash collection and a convenient carrying handle for easy dumping.

2. Durable metal pole: The pole of the set is made of metal stainless steel, which has excellent durability and can be used for a long time without being easily damaged. The characteristics of this rod also make the broom not overly heavy when used, allowing you to sweep the floor more easily.

3. Easy to assemble: The three parts of the broomstick are equipped with simple threaded nails at the joint, making it very easy to assemble. Just screw the three parts together and you will be able to get a long and sturdy handle on the dustpan and brush that can meet the needs of different places such as kitchen, home, office or hall. This design makes the whole set very easy to use without additional tools or complicated operations.

4. Folding dustpan knob design: the dustpan is equipped with a convenient folding knob, making it easier to fold the broom for storage. With only a small gap, you can put the broom into the dustpan intact, saving you the trouble of storing it. This design makes the set more compact and takes up less space.

5. Scraping tooth design and cleaning hair: The dustpan is equipped with a scraping tooth design that makes cleaning tangled hair from the broom a breeze. With just one scrape, you can remove the hair from the broom without worrying about contaminating your hands. This design makes cleaning more hygienic and convenient, providing you with a better experience!
description: Swivelling broom head: The broom head has a swivelling design that allows you to easily clean the bottom crevices of beds, sofas, coffee tables and other furniture. Scraper design: The scraper design on the dustpan makes cleaning the hairs tangled in the broom a breeze. GOLDEN ANGLE SWIVELING BRUSH HEAD DESIGN: The angle of the brush head of this set with the floor is designed with a golden angle, i.e. 45°, which is the ideal cleaning angle. It stays close to the floor to ensure optimal results when cleaning and cleans up dead corners with ease. In addition, the brush head is designed to fit the wall, making it easy to clean corners and edges for a more thorough sweep. Translated with DeepL.com (free version)
